channel.title: Latest Posts in Modding
channel.description: See the latest posts of the category Modding here.

item.title: Mod File Overwriting To Patch
item.description: I recently was fed up with waiting for the Mod Configuration Tool to include my fixes, so I thought I'd just go ahead...

item.title: Idrinth Thalui in Skyrim v1.1
item.description: One of the major mods I'm currently working on is Idrinth Thalui, the Altmer Vampire in Skyrim SE. Besides thousands of...
